name: operations managers in marketing agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For operations managers in marketing agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate revenue predictions cause cash flow issues. We provide a sales forecasting tool instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
target_audience: operations managers in marketing agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month
problem_solved: inaccurate revenue predictions leading to cash flow issues
features: simple revenue prediction based on pipeline data
